delete_account.title: Account & Data Deletion
delete_account.subtitle: In accordance with General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Right to be Forgotten.
delete_account.intro: You have full control over your data. If you wish to stop using Stockman, you can delete your account and all associated data in two ways.
delete_account.method_app_desc: This is the fastest and most secure method because it validates your identity instantly.
method_app_steps: Scroll down to the **Danger Zone** section.
delete_account.method_web_desc: If you no longer have access to the app, you can send us a manual deletion request.
delete_account.method_web_note: Note: For security reasons, we will need to verify your identity by email or phone before proceeding with the deletion.
delete_account.data_erased_desc: Deleting your account is **permanent** and irreversible. The following data will be immediately removed from our production servers:
data_erased_list: All your shops and points of sale.
Your entire inventory and product catalog.
All your sales transactions and accounting history.
Your customer lists, suppliers, and purchase histories.
Your AI Assistant access and chat history.
delete_account.retention_desc: Once the request is validated, your data is immediately marked for deletion. Complete erasure from our backups can take up to 30 days, during which your data remains inaccessible and unprocessed.

abandonner-cahier-stock.title: Why ditch the notebook for stock management?
abandonner-cahier-stock.excerpt: The notebook has its limits. Discover how going digital can save your business from calculation errors and losses.
abandonner-cahier-stock.content:
Many merchants still use a notebook to record their sales and stock. It's a traditional method, but it carries serious risks.

1. Calculation errors

A simple addition mistake can throw off your entire accounting. With software like Stockman, calculations are automatic and error-free.

2. Data loss

A notebook can be lost, stolen or destroyed by fire. Your data on Stockman is backed up in the cloud and accessible anywhere.

3. No big picture

It's hard to know which product sells best by flipping through pages. Stockman gives you this information in one click.

Conclusion

Going digital is not an expense — it's an investment that saves you time and money from the very first month.

eviter-ruptures-fetes.title: How to avoid stockouts during the holidays?
eviter-ruptures-fetes.excerpt: Christmas and Tabaski are critical periods. Prepare your stock in advance with our expert tips.
eviter-ruptures-fetes.content:
Stockouts during the holidays mean a direct loss of revenue. Here's how to avoid them.

Anticipate demand

Use last year's sales history to forecast the quantities you need to order.

Order early

Suppliers are often overwhelmed. Place your orders 2 to 3 weeks earlier than usual.

Use Stockman alerts

Set up alert thresholds to be notified as soon as a product starts running low.

augmenter-marge-2026.title: 3 tips to increase your margin in 2026
augmenter-marge-2026.excerpt: Revenue is good, but margin is better! Learn how to optimize your costs and prices.
augmenter-marge-2026.content:
Raising prices isn't the only way to earn more. Here's how to work on your margin.

1. Reduce losses

Expired or stolen products are costly. Rigorous stock tracking can reduce these losses by 30%.

2. Negotiate with your suppliers

By consolidating your orders through the Stockman Marketplace, you can get better rates.

3. Build customer loyalty

A loyal customer costs less to acquire than a new one. Use the loyalty program to keep them coming back.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.content:
Welcome to Stockman.
These Terms and Conditions of Use (hereinafter "Terms") constitute a binding legal framework between the User and the Publisher of the Stockman solution.

TITLE I: GENERAL PROVISIONS

Article 1: Definitions

  • Platform: Refers to the complete Stockman software infrastructure.
  • User: Entity or individual using the services for professional purposes.
  • Publisher: Stockman Inc., owner and operator of Stockman.
  • Shop / Store: Logical instance created by a User to manage their activities.

Article 2: Purpose of Services

Stockman is an ERP solution specialized in stock management, point of sale and customer relations. It is provided as a service (SaaS).

Article 3: Acceptance of Terms

Access to the Platform is conditional upon full and complete acceptance of these Terms.

Article 4: Capacity and Professional Use

Stockman is a strictly professional tool. The User warrants that they use the service for their commercial activity.

Article 5: Modification of Terms

The Publisher reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after modification constitutes acceptance.

TITLE II: ACCESS AND ACCOUNT MANAGEMENT

Article 6: Registration

The User agrees to provide truthful data during registration.

Article 7: Credential Security

The User is responsible for safeguarding their password.

Article 8: Profile Management

The User may modify their information. This data must remain professional.

Article 9: Staff Accounts

The Owner may create access for their employees and assumes responsibility for their actions.

Article 10: Permissions

The User accepts the role system (Admin, Seller, Manager).

TITLE III: COMMERCIAL OPERATIONS

Articles 11-18

The User is responsible for creating their product listings, inventory, sales and returns. Stockman provides a theoretical stock status. The Publisher is not responsible for discrepancies.

TITLES IV-IX: DATA, AI, SECURITY

AI may produce errors. Predictions are probabilities. Data is backed up daily. The Publisher guarantees the exercise of GDPR rights. Any dispute shall be subject to the law of the Publisher's registered office.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Welcome to Stockman. Protecting your personal data is a priority for us.

1. Data Collection

We collect: identification information (name, email, phone), professional data (store, inventory, transactions), technical data (IP, device, logs).

2. Data Usage

Your data is used exclusively for: managing your stock and sales, securing your account, improving our services and complying with our legal obligations.

3. Storage and Security

Your data is stored on secure servers (MongoDB Atlas) and encrypted at rest. We use the HTTPS protocol for all transfers.

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell or rent your data. It may only be shared with our technical service providers and authorities if required by law.

5. Your Rights (GDPR)

You have the rights of access, rectification, erasure and portability. Exercise these rights from the Settings tab of the app.

6. Contact

For any questions, contact us through the app or at contact@stockman.pro.
